summary: End-to-end UI testing of the new Catalog feature for admin/employee (/admin/catalog) and sales agent (/agent/catalog). Validated sidebar entry, product grid, search, filters (category/min/max/in-stock), sort, variant gating, cart sheet, qty inc/dec/remove, customer + doc-type selection, pricing preview, inline checkout (creates order + navigates to detail), and 'Edit in form first' (URL prefill into OrderNew). Admin flow fully functional. Agent inline checkout works. Found ONE FUNCTIONAL BUG: agent 'Edit in form first' fails to prefill because AgentNewOrder.jsx ignores URL query params.

ui_bugs.issue: Agent flow: 'Edit in form first' from /agent/catalog navigates to /agent/new-order?customer_id=...&type=...&items=<json> but the page does NOT read useSearchParams. Result: customer dropdown shows 'Choose customer' (empty) and items section shows 'Tap Add to start' — nothing pre-filled. Admin equivalent (OrderNew.jsx lines 58-73) reads searchParams correctly; AgentNewOrder.jsx must mirror this logic.

React console warning: 'contains an input of type number with both value and defaultValue props.' Source: /app/frontend/src/pages/Catalog.jsx line ~386 — Input has both defaultValue="1" and value={qtyPick[p.id] || ''}. Remove defaultValue (or use placeholder + controlled value only).

integration_issues.flow: Agent: Catalog -> Edit in form first -> AgentNewOrder
integration_issues.issue: Customer, document type, and line items not prefilled because AgentNewOrder.jsx never imports/uses useSearchParams. User has to re-enter everything they already chose in catalog cart.

issues: TEST_ Image Product / TEST_ Image Replace cards show solid black squares (1x1 PNGs from prior test seed). Cosmetic only — main agent already noted these are leftover seed data; consider cleanup script to remove TEST_ products from seed DB or replace with proper placeholder.

action_items: FIX: Update /app/frontend/src/pages/agent/AgentNewOrder.jsx to read useSearchParams (customer_id, type, items) and prefill state on mount — mirror logic in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/OrderNew.jsx lines 58-73.

MINOR: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Catalog.jsx, remove `defaultValue="1"` from the qty <Input> (line ~386) since `value` is already provided — eliminates the React controlled/uncontrolled warning. Use placeholder="1" alone.
OPTIONAL: Clean up seed leftover TEST_ products with 1×1 black PNG thumbnails.
critical_code_review_comments: AgentNewOrder.jsx is missing the URL prefill logic added to OrderNew.jsx — same Catalog component sends query params to both routes but only admin handles them. This breaks one of the four required flow combinations.
Catalog.jsx qty Input mixes controlled (value) and uncontrolled (defaultValue) props, generating a React warning on every product card render.
Catalog.jsx uses naive Number() coercion on min/max price filters; non-numeric junk silently becomes NaN and filters everything out. Consider isFinite() guard, but low priority.

Catalog.jsx fetches /tax-jurisdictions on mount even for sales_agent role, where employee/agent typically gets 401 — currently silently caught (.catch(()=>{})), which is fine but expected console noise.

success_rate.frontend: 94% (15 of 16 flows pass; agent edit-in-form prefill is broken)

seed_data_creation: None new. Created 2 throwaway sales orders during inline-checkout testing (one as admin → SO-#### with Premium Widget; one as agent → SO-00054 TEST VarCust) using existing customers. No TEST_ prefix orders created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin catalog flow (search/filter/sort/cart/inline-checkout/edit-in-form) is solid — re-test only the agent prefill fix once main agent updates AgentNewOrder.jsx. Existing test_variants.py / test_taxes.py / test_product_images.py were not re-run this iteration but main agent indicated they still pass.
rca of the issue: AgentNewOrder.jsx (/app/frontend/src/pages/agent/AgentNewOrder.jsx) does not import useSearchParams from react-router-dom and has no useEffect that reads customer_id / type / items from window.location.search. The new shared Catalog component (Catalog.jsx line 152) routes agents to '/agent/new-order' with the cart serialized as URL params — but only admin's OrderNew.jsx handles those params. Reproduction: login as agent → /agent/catalog → add product → open cart → pick customer → click 'Edit in form first' → arrives at /agent/new-order?customer_id=...&items=... with empty form. Fix: copy lines 57-73 of OrderNew.jsx (the else-branch prefill) into AgentNewOrder.jsx's mount useEffect.
